You are working on the ankidroid/Anki-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 2.1710 (commit: 8feffeee).

## Issue to Resolve

[BUG]: Card remains selected even after unselecting it
### Checked for duplicates?

- [X] This issue is not a duplicate

### What are the steps to reproduce this bug?

- In the Card Browser, select a card.
- Then, select another card and unselect the previous one.

### Expected behaviour

The previous card gets unselected.

### Actual behaviour

The previous card remains selected (as indicated by the selected card count at the top). If you scroll down and then up again, both cards would even show the checkmarks.

### Debug info

```text
2.17 alpha 10
```


### (Optional) Anything else you want to share?

_No response_

### Research

- [X] I am reporting a bug specific to AnkiDroid (Android app)
- [X] I have checked the [manual](https://ankidroid.org/docs/manual.html) and the [FAQ](https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/wiki/FAQ) and could not find a solution to my issue
- [X] (Optional) I have confirmed the issue is not resolved in the latest alpha release ([instructions](https://docs.ankidroid.org/manual.html#betaTesting))

## Additional Context from Issue Discussion

* ref: https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/pull/14900
I'm aiming to get this done within 24 hours
This can be worked around by tapping the checkbox, not the row

Will be fixed shortly, sorry for the inconvenience

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/CardBrowser.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/browser/CardBrowserViewModel.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

 177→    private var onEditCardActivityResult = registerForActivityResult(StartActivityForResult()) { result: ActivityResult ->
 178→        Timber.d("onEditCardActivityResult: resultCode=%d", result.resultCode)
 179→        if (result.resultCode == DeckPicker.RESULT_DB_ERROR) {
 180→            closeCardBrowser(DeckPicker.RESULT_DB_ERROR)
 181→        }
 182→        if (result.resultCode != RESULT_CANCELED) {
 183→            Timber.i("CardBrowser:: CardBrowser: Saving card...")
 184→            launchCatchingTask { saveEditedCard() }
 185→        }
 186→        val data = result.data
 187→        if (data != null &&
 188→            (data.getBooleanExtra(NoteEditor.RELOAD_REQUIRED_EXTRA_KEY, false) || data.getBooleanExtra(NoteEditor.NOTE_CHANGED_EXTRA_KEY, false))
 189→        ) {
 190→            Timber.d("Reloading Card Browser due to activity result")
 191→            // if reloadRequired or noteChanged flag was sent from note editor then reload card list
 192→            mShouldRestoreScroll = true
 193→            searchCards()
 194→            // in use by reviewer?
 195→            if (reviewerCardId == mCurrentCardId) {
 196→                mReloadRequired = true
 197→            }
 198→        }
 199→        invalidateOptionsMenu() // maybe the availability of undo changed
 200→    }
 201→    private var onAddNoteActivityResult = registerForActivityResult(StartActivityForResult()) { result: ActivityResult ->
 202→        Timber.d("onAddNoteActivityResult: resultCode=%d", result.resultCode)
 203→        if (result.resultCode == DeckPicker.RESULT_DB_ERROR) {
 204→            closeCardBrowser(DeckPicker.RESULT_DB_ERROR)
 205→        }
 206→        if (result.resultCode == RESULT_OK) {
 207→            if (mSearchView != null) {
 208→                mSearchTerms = mSearchView!!.query.toString()
 209→                searchCards()
 210→            } else {
 211→                Timber.w("Note was added from browser and on return mSearchView == null")
 212→            }
 213→        }
 214→        invalidateOptionsMenu() // maybe the availability of undo changed
 215→    }
 216→    private var onPreviewCardsActivityResult = registerForActivityResult(StartActivityForResult()) { result: ActivityResult ->
 217→        Timber.d("onPreviewCardsActivityResult: resultCode=%d", result.resultCode)
 218→        if (result.resultCode == DeckPicker.RESULT_DB_ERROR) {
 219→            closeCardBrowser(DeckPicker.RESULT_DB_ERROR)
 220→        }
 221→        // Previewing can now perform an "edit", so it can pass on a reloadRequired
 222→        val data = result.data
 223→        if (data != null &&
 224→            (data.getBooleanExtra(NoteEditor.RELOAD_REQUIRED_EXTRA_KEY, false) || data.getBooleanExtra(NoteEditor.NOTE_CHANGED_EXTRA_KEY, false))
 225→        ) {
 226→            searchCards()
 227→            if (reviewerCardId == mCurrentCardId) {
 228→                mReloadRequired = true
 229→            }
 230→        }
 231→        invalidateOptionsMenu() // maybe the availability of undo changed
 232→    }

 395→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 396→        if (showedActivityFailedScreen(savedInstanceState)) {
 397→            return
 398→        }
 399→        // must be called after showedActivityFailedScreen
 400→        viewModel = createViewModel()
 401→
 402→        mTagsDialogFactory = TagsDialogFactory(this).attachToActivity<TagsDialogFactory>(this)
 403→        mExportingDelegate = ActivityExportingDelegate(this) { getColUnsafe }
 404→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
 405→        if (wasLoadedFromExternalTextActionItem() && !hasStorageAccessPermission(this) && !Permissions.isExternalStorageManagerCompat()) {
 406→            Timber.w("'Card Browser' Action item pressed before storage permissions granted.")
 407→            showThemedToast(
 408→                this,
 409→                getString(R.string.intent_handler_failed_no_storage_permission),
 410→                false
 411→            )
 412→            displayDeckPickerForPermissionsDialog()
 413→            return
 414→        }
 415→        setContentView(R.layout.card_browser)
 416→        initNavigationDrawer(findViewById(android.R.id.content))
 417→        // initialize the lateinit variables
 418→        // Load reference to action bar title
 419→        mActionBarTitle = findViewById(R.id.toolbar_title)
 420→        cardsListView = findViewById(R.id.card_browser_list)
 421→        val preferences = baseContext.sharedPrefs()
 422→        // get the font and font size from the preferences
 423→        val sflRelativeFontSize =
 424→            preferences.getInt("relativeCardBrowserFontSize", DEFAULT_FONT_SIZE_RATIO)
 425→        val columnsContent = arrayOf(
 426→            COLUMN1_KEYS[viewModel.column1Index],
 427→            COLUMN2_KEYS[viewModel.column2Index]
 428→        )
 429→        // make a new list adapter mapping the data in mCards to column1 and column2 of R.layout.card_item_browser
 430→        cardsAdapter = MultiColumnListAdapter(
 431→            this,
 432→            R.layout.card_item_browser,
 433→            columnsContent,
 434→            intArrayOf(R.id.card_sfld, R.id.card_column2),
 435→            sflRelativeFontSize
 436→        )
 437→        // link the adapter to the main mCardsListView
 438→        cardsListView.adapter = cardsAdapter
 439→        // make the items (e.g. question & answer) render dynamically when scrolling
 440→        cardsListView.setOnScrollListener(RenderOnScroll())
 441→        startLoadingCollection()
 442→
 443→        // search card using deep links
 444→        intent.data?.getQueryParameter("search")?.let {
 445→            mSearchTerms = it
 446→            searchCards()
 447→        }
 448→
 449→        // for intent coming from search query js api
 450→        intent.getStringExtra("search_query")?.let {
 451→            mSearchTerms = it
 452→            if (intent.getBooleanExtra("all_decks", false)) {
 453→                onDeckSelected(SelectableDeck(ALL_DECKS_ID, getString(R.string.card_browser_all_decks)))
 454→            }
 455→            searchCards()
 456→        }
 457→
 458→        // Selected cards aren't restored on activity recreation,
 459→        // so it is necessary to dismiss the change deck dialog
 460→        val dialogFragment = supportFragmentManager.findFragmentByTag(DIALOG_FRAGMENT_TAG)
 461→        if (dialogFragment is DeckSelectionDialog) {
 462→            if (dialogFragment.requireArguments().getBoolean(CHANGE_DECK_KEY, false)) {
 463→                Timber.d("onCreate(): Change deck dialog dismissed")
 464→                dialogFragment.dismiss()
 465→            }
 466→        }
 467→        mOnboarding.onCreate()
 468→
 469→        viewModel.isTruncatedFlow
 470→            .flowWithLifecycle(lifecycle, Lifecycle.State.STARTED)
 471→            .onEach { cardsAdapter.notifyDataSetChanged() }
 472→            .launchIn(lifecycleScope)
 473→
 474→        viewModel.cardsOrNotesFlow
 475→            .flowWithLifecycle(lifecycle, Lifecycle.State.STARTED)
 476→            .onEach { runOnUiThread { searchCards() } }
 477→            .launchIn(lifecycleScope)

 479→        viewModel.selectedRowsFlow

 502→    override fun onCollectionLoaded(col: com.ichi2.libanki.Collection) {
 503→        super.onCollectionLoaded(col)
 504→        Timber.d("onCollectionLoaded()")
 505→        registerExternalStorageListener()
 506→        val preferences = baseContext.sharedPrefs()
 507→
 508→        mOrder = SortType.fromCol(col.config, preferences)
 509→        mOrderAsc = col.config.get("sortBackwards") ?: false
 510→        mCards.reset()
 511→        // Create a spinner for column 1
 512→        findViewById<Spinner>(R.id.browser_column1_spinner).apply {
 513→            adapter = ArrayAdapter.createFromResource(
 514→                this@CardBrowser,
 515→                R.array.browser_column1_headings,
 516→                android.R.layout.simple_spinner_item
 517→            ).apply {
 518→                setDropDownViewResource(R.layout.spinner_custom_layout)
 519→            }
 520→            onItemSelectedListener = BasicItemSelectedListener { pos, _ ->
 521→                viewModel.setColumn1Index(pos)
 522→            }
 523→            setSelection(viewModel.column1Index)
 524→        }
 525→        // Setup the column 2 heading as a spinner so that users can easily change the column type
 526→        findViewById<Spinner>(R.id.browser_column2_spinner).apply {
 527→            adapter = ArrayAdapter.createFromResource(
 528→                this@CardBrowser,
 529→                R.array.browser_column2_headings,
 530→                android.R.layout.simple_spinner_item
 531→            ).apply {
 532→                // The custom layout for the adapter is used to prevent the overlapping of various interactive components on the screen
 533→                setDropDownViewResource(R.layout.spinner_custom_layout)
 534→            }
 535→            // Create a new list adapter with updated column map any time the user changes the column
 536→            onItemSelectedListener = BasicItemSelectedListener { pos, _ ->
 537→                viewModel.setColumn2Index(pos)
 538→            }
 539→            setSelection(viewModel.column2Index)
 540→        }
 541→
 542→        cardsListView.setOnItemClickListener { _: AdapterView<*>?, view: View?, position: Int, _: Long ->
 543→            if (isInMultiSelectMode) {
 544→                // click on whole cell triggers select
 545→                val cb = view!!.findViewById<CheckBox>(R.id.card_checkbox)
 546→                cb.toggle()
 547→                viewModel.selectRowAtPosition(position)
 548→            } else {
 549→                // load up the card selected on the list
 550→                val clickedCardId = viewModel.getCardIdAtPosition(position)
 551→                saveScrollingState(position)
 552→                openNoteEditorForCard(clickedCardId)
 553→            }
 554→        }
 555→        @KotlinCleanup("helper function for min/max range")
 556→        cardsListView.setOnItemLongClickListener { _: AdapterView<*>?, view: View?, position: Int, _: Long ->
 557→            if (isInMultiSelectMode) {
 558→                viewModel.selectRowsBetweenPositions(mLastSelectedPosition, position)
 559→            } else {
 560→                mLastSelectedPosition = position
 561→                saveScrollingState(position)
 562→                loadMultiSelectMode()
 563→
 564→                // click on whole cell triggers select
 565→                val cb = view!!.findViewById<CheckBox>(R.id.card_checkbox)
 566→                cb.toggle()
 567→                viewModel.toggleRowSelectionAtPosition(position)
 568→                recenterListView(view)
 569→                cardsAdapter.notifyDataSetChanged()
 570→            }
 571→            true
 572→        }
 573→        window.setSoftInputMode(WindowManager.LayoutParams.SOFT_INPUT_STATE_ALWAYS_HIDDEN)
 574→        val deckId = col.decks.selected()
 575→        deckSpinnerSelection = DeckSpinnerSelection(
 576→            this,
 577→            col,
 578→            findViewById(R.id.toolbar_spinner),
 579→            showAllDecks = true,
 580→            alwaysShowDefault = false,
 581→            showFilteredDecks = true
 582→        )
 583→        deckSpinnerSelection!!.initializeActionBarDeckSpinner(this.supportActionBar!!)
 584→        selectDeckAndSave(deckId)
 585→
 586→        // If a valid value for last deck exists then use it, otherwise use libanki selected deck
 587→        if (lastDeckId != null && lastDeckId == ALL_DECKS_ID) {
 588→            selectAllDecks()
 589→        } else if (lastDeckId != null && col.decks.get(lastDeckId!!) != null) {
 590→            deckSpinnerSelection!!.selectDeckById(lastDeckId!!, false)
 591→        } else {
 592→            deckSpinnerSelection!!.selectDeckById(col.decks.selected(), false)
 593→        }
 594→    }

 608→    override fun onKeyDown(keyCode: Int, event: KeyEvent): Boolean {
 609→        // NOTE: These are all active when typing in the search - doesn't matter as all need CTRL
 610→        when (keyCode) {
 611→            KeyEvent.KEYCODE_A -> {
 612→                if (event.isCtrlPressed) {
 613→                    Timber.i("Ctrl+A - Select All")
 614→                    viewModel.selectAll()
 615→                    return true
 616→                }
 617→            }
 618→            KeyEvent.KEYCODE_E -> {
 619→                // Ctrl+Shift+E: Export (TODO)
 620→                if (event.isCtrlPressed) {
 621→                    Timber.i("Ctrl+E: Add Note")
 622→                    launchCatchingTask { addNoteFromCardBrowser() }
 623→                    return true
 624→                }
 625→            }
 626→            KeyEvent.KEYCODE_D -> {
 627→                if (event.isCtrlPressed) {
 628→                    Timber.i("Ctrl+D: Change Deck")
 629→                    showChangeDeckDialog()
 630→                    return true
 631→                }
 632→            }
 633→            KeyEvent.KEYCODE_K -> {
 634→                if (event.isCtrlPressed) {
 635→                    Timber.i("Ctrl+K: Toggle Mark")
 636→                    toggleMark()
 637→                    return true
 638→                }
 639→            }
 640→            KeyEvent.KEYCODE_R -> {
 641→                if (event.isCtrlPressed && event.isAltPressed) {
 642→                    Timber.i("Ctrl+Alt+R - Reschedule")
 643→                    rescheduleSelectedCards()
 644→                    return true
 645→                }
 646→            }
 647→            KeyEvent.KEYCODE_FORWARD_DEL -> {
 648→                Timber.i("Delete pressed - Delete Selected Note")
 649→                deleteSelectedNotes()
 650→                return true
 651→            }
 652→            KeyEvent.KEYCODE_F -> {
 653→                if (event.isCtrlPressed) {
 654→                    Timber.i("Ctrl+F - Find notes")
 655→                    mSearchItem?.expandActionView()
 656→                    return true
 657→                }
 658→            }
 659→        }
 660→        return super.onKeyDown(keyCode, event)

 751→    @KotlinCleanup("Add a few variables to get rid of the !!")
 752→    override fun onCreateOptionsMenu(menu: Menu): Boolean {
 753→        Timber.d("onCreateOptionsMenu()")
 754→        mActionBarMenu = menu
 755→        if (!isInMultiSelectMode) {
 756→            // restore drawer click listener and icon
 757→            restoreDrawerIcon()
 758→            menuInflater.inflate(R.menu.card_browser, menu)
 759→            mSaveSearchItem = menu.findItem(R.id.action_save_search)
 760→            mSaveSearchItem?.isVisible = false // the searchview's query always starts empty.
 761→            mMySearchesItem = menu.findItem(R.id.action_list_my_searches)
 762→            val savedFiltersObj = savedFilters(getColUnsafe)
 763→            mMySearchesItem!!.isVisible = savedFiltersObj.size > 0
 764→            mSearchItem = menu.findItem(R.id.action_search)
 765→            mSearchItem!!.setOnActionExpandListener(object : MenuItem.OnActionExpandListener {
 766→                override fun onMenuItemActionExpand(item: MenuItem): Boolean {
 767→                    return true
 768→                }
 769→
 770→                override fun onMenuItemActionCollapse(item: MenuItem): Boolean {
 771→                    // SearchView doesn't support empty queries so we always reset the search when collapsing
 772→                    mSearchTerms = ""

 775→                    // invalidate options menu so that disappeared icons would appear again
 776→                    invalidateOptionsMenu()
 777→                    mTempSearchQuery = null
 778→                    return true
 779→                }
 780→            })
 781→            mSearchView = mSearchItem!!.actionView as CardBrowserSearchView
 782→            mSearchView!!.setOnQueryTextListener(object : SearchView.OnQueryTextListener {
 783→                override fun onQueryTextChange(newText: String): Boolean {
 784→                    if (mSearchView!!.shouldIgnoreValueChange()) {
 785→                        return true
 786→                    }
 787→                    mSaveSearchItem?.isVisible = newText.isNotEmpty()
 788→                    mTempSearchQuery = newText
 789→                    return true
 790→                }

 792→                override fun onQueryTextSubmit(query: String): Boolean {
 793→                    onSearch()
 794→                    mSearchView!!.clearFocus()

 796→                }
 797→            })
 798→            // Fixes #6500 - keep the search consistent if coming back from note editor
 799→            // Fixes #9010 - consistent search after drawer change calls invalidateOptionsMenu (mTempSearchQuery)
 800→            if (!mTempSearchQuery.isNullOrEmpty() || mSearchTerms.isNotEmpty()) {
 801→                mSearchItem!!.expandActionView() // This calls mSearchView.setOnSearchClickListener
 802→                val toUse = if (!mTempSearchQuery.isNullOrEmpty()) mTempSearchQuery else mSearchTerms
 803→                mSearchView!!.setQuery(toUse!!, false)
 804→            }
 805→            mSearchView!!.setOnSearchClickListener {

 808→            }
 809→        } else {

 815→        mActionBarMenu?.findItem(R.id.action_undo)?.run {
 816→            isVisible = getColUnsafe.undoAvailable()
 817→            title = getColUnsafe.undoLabel()
 818→        }
 819→
 820→        // Maybe we were called from ACTION_PROCESS_TEXT.
 821→        // In that case we already fill in the search.
 822→        if (Intent.ACTION_PROCESS_TEXT == intent.action) {
 823→            val search = intent.getCharSequenceExtra(Intent.EXTRA_PROCESS_TEXT)
 824→            if (!search.isNullOrEmpty()) {
 825→                Timber.i("CardBrowser :: Called with search intent: %s", search.toString())
 826→                mSearchView!!.setQuery(search, true)

 54→class CardBrowserViewModel(
 55→    preferences: SharedPreferencesProvider
 56→) : ViewModel(), SharedPreferencesProvider by preferences {
 57→    val cards = CardBrowser.CardCollection<CardBrowser.CardCache>()
 58→
 59→    /** The CardIds of all the cards in the results */
 60→    val allCardIds get() = cards.map { c -> c.id }.toLongArray()
 61→
 62→    var searchTerms: String = ""
 63→    var restrictOnDeck: String = ""
 64→    var currentFlag = 0

 66→    /**
 67→     * Whether the browser is working in Cards mode or Notes mode.
 68→     * default: [CARDS]
 69→     * */
 70→    val cardsOrNotesFlow = MutableStateFlow(CARDS)
 71→    val cardsOrNotes get() = cardsOrNotesFlow.value
 72→
 73→    // card that was clicked (not marked)
 74→    var currentCardId: CardId = 0
 75→    var order = SortType.NO_SORTING
 76→    var orderAsc = false
 77→
 78→    val column1IndexFlow = MutableStateFlow(sharedPrefs().getInt(DISPLAY_COLUMN_1_KEY, 0))
 79→    val column2IndexFlow = MutableStateFlow(sharedPrefs().getInt(DISPLAY_COLUMN_2_KEY, 0))
 80→    val column1Index get() = column1IndexFlow.value
 81→    val column2Index get() = column2IndexFlow.value

 83→    /** The query which is currently in the search box, potentially null. Only set when search box was open  */
 84→    var tempSearchQuery: String? = null
 85→
 86→    var isInMultiSelectMode = false
 87→
 88→    val isTruncatedFlow: MutableStateFlow<Boolean> =
 89→        MutableStateFlow(sharedPrefs().getBoolean("isTruncated", false))
 90→    val isTruncated get() = isTruncatedFlow.value
 91→
 92→    private val _selectedRows: MutableSet<CardBrowser.CardCache> = Collections.synchronizedSet(LinkedHashSet())
 93→
 94→    // immutable accessor for _selectedRows
 95→    val selectedRows: Set<CardBrowser.CardCache> get() = _selectedRows
 96→
 97→    private val refreshSelectedRowsFlow = MutableSharedFlow<Unit>()
 98→    val selectedRowsFlow: Flow<Set<CardBrowser.CardCache>> =
 99→        flowOf(selectedRows).combine(refreshSelectedRowsFlow) { row, _ -> row }
100→
101→    val selectedCardIds: List<Long>
102→        get() = selectedRows.map { c -> c.id }
103→    var lastSelectedPosition = 0
104→
105→    val cardInfoDestination: CardInfoDestination?
106→        get() {
107→            val firstSelectedCard = selectedCardIds.firstOrNull() ?: return null
108→            return CardInfoDestination(firstSelectedCard)
109→        }
110→
111→    init {
112→        column1IndexFlow
113→            .onEach { index -> sharedPrefs().edit { putInt(DISPLAY_COLUMN_1_KEY, index) } }
114→            .launchIn(viewModelScope)
115→
116→        column2IndexFlow
117→            .onEach { index -> sharedPrefs().edit { putInt(DISPLAY_COLUMN_2_KEY, index) } }
118→            .launchIn(viewModelScope)
119→
120→        viewModelScope.launch {
121→            val cardsOrNotes = withCol { CardsOrNotes.fromCollection(this) }
122→            cardsOrNotesFlow.update { cardsOrNotes }
123→        }
124→    }
125→
126→    /** Whether any rows are selected */
127→    fun hasSelectedAnyRows(): Boolean = selectedRows.isNotEmpty()
128→
129→    /**
130→     * All the notes of the selected cards will be marked
131→     * If one or more card is unmarked, all will be marked,
132→     * otherwise, they will be unmarked
133→     */
134→    suspend fun toggleMark(cardIds: List<CardId>) {
135→        if (!hasSelectedAnyRows()) {
136→            Timber.i("Not marking cards - nothing selected")
137→            return
138→        }
139→        undoableOp {
140→            val noteIds = notesOfCards(cardIds)
141→            // if all notes are marked, remove the mark
142→            // if no notes are marked, add the mark
143→            // if there is a mix, enable the mark on all
144→            val wantMark = !noteIds.all { getNote(it).hasTag("marked") }
145→            Timber.i("setting mark = %b for %d notes", wantMark, noteIds.size)
146→            if (wantMark) {
147→                tags.bulkAdd(noteIds, "marked")
148→            } else {
149→                tags.bulkRemove(noteIds, "marked")
150→            }
151→        }
152→    }
153→
154→    /**
155→     * Deletes the selected notes,
156→     * @return the number of deleted notes
157→     */
158→    suspend fun deleteSelectedNotes(): Int =
159→        undoableOp { removeNotes(cids = selectedCardIds) }.count
160→
161→    fun setCardsOrNotes(newValue: CardsOrNotes) = viewModelScope.launch {
162→        withCol {
163→            // Change this to only change the preference on a state change
164→            newValue.saveToCollection(this)
165→        }
166→        cardsOrNotesFlow.update { newValue }
167→    }
168→
169→    fun setTruncated(value: Boolean) {
170→        viewModelScope.launch {
171→            isTruncatedFlow.emit(value)
172→        }
173→        sharedPrefs().edit {
174→            putBoolean("isTruncated", value)
175→        }
176→    }

178→    fun selectAll() {
179→        if (_selectedRows.addAll(cards.wrapped)) {
180→            refreshSelectedRowsFlow()

183→
184→    fun selectNone() {
185→        if (_selectedRows.isEmpty()) return
186→        _selectedRows.clear()
187→        refreshSelectedRowsFlow()
188→    }
189→
190→    fun toggleRowSelectionAtPosition(position: Int) {
191→        val card = cards[position]
192→        if (_selectedRows.contains(card)) {
193→            _selectedRows.remove(card)
194→        } else {
195→            _selectedRows.add(card)
196→        }
197→        refreshSelectedRowsFlow()
198→    }
199→
200→    fun selectRowAtPosition(pos: Int) {
201→        if (_selectedRows.add(cards[pos])) {
202→            refreshSelectedRowsFlow()
203→        }
204→    }
205→
206→    /**
207→     * Selects the cards between [startPos] and [endPos]
208→     */
209→    fun selectRowsBetweenPositions(startPos: Int, endPos: Int) {
210→        val cards = (min(startPos, endPos)..max(startPos, endPos)).map { cards[it] }
211→        if (_selectedRows.addAll(cards)) {
212→            refreshSelectedRowsFlow()
213→        }
214→    }

216→    /** emits a new value in [selectedRowsFlow] */
217→    private fun refreshSelectedRowsFlow() = viewModelScope.launch {
218→        refreshSelectedRowsFlow.emit(Unit)
219→    }
220→
221→    fun selectedRowCount(): Int = selectedRows.size
222→
223→    fun setColumn1Index(value: Int) = column1IndexFlow.update { value }
224→
225→    fun setColumn2Index(value: Int) = column2IndexFlow.update { value }
226→    suspend fun suspendCards() {
227→        val cardIds = selectedCardIds
228→        if (cardIds.isEmpty()) {
229→            return
230→        }
231→
232→        undoableOp {
233→            // if all cards are suspended, unsuspend all
234→            // if no cards are suspended, suspend all
235→            // if there is a mix, suspend all
236→            val wantUnsuspend = cardIds.all { getCard(it).queue == Consts.QUEUE_TYPE_SUSPENDED }
237→            if (wantUnsuspend) {
238→                sched.unsuspendCards(cardIds)
239→            } else {
240→                sched.suspendCards(cardIds).changes
241→            }
242→        }
243→    }

245→    /** @return an [ExportDialogParams] based on the current screen state */
246→    suspend fun getExportDialogParams(resources: Resources): ExportDialogParams? {
247→        if (!isInMultiSelectMode) return null
248→        return when (cardsOrNotes) {
249→            CARDS -> {
250→                val selectedCardIds = selectedCardIds
251→                ExportDialogParams(
252→                    message = resources.getQuantityString(
253→                        R.plurals.confirm_apkg_export_selected_cards,
254→                        selectedCardIds.size,
255→                        selectedCardIds.size
256→                    ),
257→                    exportType = ExportType.ExportCards(selectedCardIds)
258→                )
259→            }
260→            NOTES -> {
261→                val selectedNoteIds = withCol { CardService.selectedNoteIds(selectedCardIds, this) }
262→                ExportDialogParams(
263→                    message = resources.getQuantityString(
264→                        R.plurals.confirm_apkg_export_selected_notes,
265→                        selectedNoteIds.size,
266→                        selectedNoteIds.size
267→                    ),
268→                    exportType = ExportType.ExportNotes(selectedNoteIds)
269→                )
270→            }
271→        }

274→    /**
275→     * @see [com.ichi2.libanki.sched.Scheduler.sortCards]
276→     * @return the number of cards which were repositioned
277→     */
278→    suspend fun repositionSelectedRows(position: Int) = undoableOp {
279→        sched.sortCards(selectedCardIds, position, 1, shuffle = false, shift = true)
280→    }.count
281→
282→    /** Returns the number of rows of the current result set  */
283→    val rowCount: Int
284→        get() = cards.size()
285→
286→    fun getCardIdAtPosition(position: Int): CardId = cards[position].id

288→    fun getRowAtPosition(position: Int) = cards[position]
289→
290→    /** Given a card ID, returns a position-aware card */

 54→class CardBrowserViewModel(
 55→    preferences: SharedPreferencesProvider
 56→) : ViewModel(), SharedPreferencesProvider by preferences {
 57→    val cards = CardBrowser.CardCollection<CardBrowser.CardCache>()
 58→
 59→    /** The CardIds of all the cards in the results */
 60→    val allCardIds get() = cards.map { c -> c.id }.toLongArray()
 61→
 62→    var searchTerms: String = ""
 63→    var restrictOnDeck: String = ""
 64→    var currentFlag = 0
 65→
 66→    /**
 67→     * Whether the browser is working in Cards mode or Notes mode.
 68→     * default: [CARDS]
 69→     * */
 70→    val cardsOrNotesFlow = MutableStateFlow(CARDS)
 71→    val cardsOrNotes get() = cardsOrNotesFlow.value
 72→
 73→    // card that was clicked (not marked)
 74→    var currentCardId: CardId = 0
 75→    var order = SortType.NO_SORTING
 76→    var orderAsc = false
 77→
 78→    val column1IndexFlow = MutableStateFlow(sharedPrefs().getInt(DISPLAY_COLUMN_1_KEY, 0))
 79→    val column2IndexFlow = MutableStateFlow(sharedPrefs().getInt(DISPLAY_COLUMN_2_KEY, 0))
 80→    val column1Index get() = column1IndexFlow.value
 81→    val column2Index get() = column2IndexFlow.value
 82→
 83→    /** The query which is currently in the search box, potentially null. Only set when search box was open  */
 84→    var tempSearchQuery: String? = null
 85→
 86→    var isInMultiSelectMode = false
 87→
 88→    val isTruncatedFlow: MutableStateFlow<Boolean> =
 89→        MutableStateFlow(sharedPrefs().getBoolean("isTruncated", false))
 90→    val isTruncated get() = isTruncatedFlow.value
 91→
 92→    private val _selectedRows: MutableSet<CardBrowser.CardCache> = Collections.synchronizedSet(LinkedHashSet())
 93→
 94→    // immutable accessor for _selectedRows
 95→    val selectedRows: Set<CardBrowser.CardCache> get() = _selectedRows
 96→
 97→    private val refreshSelectedRowsFlow = MutableSharedFlow<Unit>()
 98→    val selectedRowsFlow: Flow<Set<CardBrowser.CardCache>> =
 99→        flowOf(selectedRows).combine(refreshSelectedRowsFlow) { row, _ -> row }
100→
101→    val selectedCardIds: List<Long>
102→        get() = selectedRows.map { c -> c.id }
103→    var lastSelectedPosition = 0
104→
105→    val cardInfoDestination: CardInfoDestination?
106→        get() {
107→            val firstSelectedCard = selectedCardIds.firstOrNull() ?: return null
108→            return CardInfoDestination(firstSelectedCard)
109→        }
110→
111→    init {
112→        column1IndexFlow
113→            .onEach { index -> sharedPrefs().edit { putInt(DISPLAY_COLUMN_1_KEY, index) } }
114→            .launchIn(viewModelScope)
115→
116→        column2IndexFlow
117→            .onEach { index -> sharedPrefs().edit { putInt(DISPLAY_COLUMN_2_KEY, index) } }
118→            .launchIn(viewModelScope)
119→
120→        viewModelScope.launch {
121→            val cardsOrNotes = withCol { CardsOrNotes.fromCollection(this) }
122→            cardsOrNotesFlow.update { cardsOrNotes }
123→        }
124→    }
125→
126→    /** Whether any rows are selected */
127→    fun hasSelectedAnyRows(): Boolean = selectedRows.isNotEmpty()
128→
129→    /**
130→     * All the notes of the selected cards will be marked
131→     * If one or more card is unmarked, all will be marked,
132→     * otherwise, they will be unmarked
133→     */
134→    suspend fun toggleMark(cardIds: List<CardId>) {
135→        if (!hasSelectedAnyRows()) {
136→            Timber.i("Not marking cards - nothing selected")
137→            return
138→        }
139→        undoableOp {
140→            val noteIds = notesOfCards(cardIds)
141→            // if all notes are marked, remove the mark
142→            // if no notes are marked, add the mark
143→            // if there is a mix, enable the mark on all
144→            val wantMark = !noteIds.all { getNote(it).hasTag("marked") }
145→            Timber.i("setting mark = %b for %d notes", wantMark, noteIds.size)
146→            if (wantMark) {
147→                tags.bulkAdd(noteIds, "marked")
148→            } else {
149→                tags.bulkRemove(noteIds, "marked")
150→            }
151→        }
152→    }
153→
154→    /**
155→     * Deletes the selected notes,
156→     * @return the number of deleted notes
157→     */
158→    suspend fun deleteSelectedNotes(): Int =
159→        undoableOp { removeNotes(cids = selectedCardIds) }.count
160→
161→    fun setCardsOrNotes(newValue: CardsOrNotes) = viewModelScope.launch {
162→        withCol {
163→            // Change this to only change the preference on a state change
164→            newValue.saveToCollection(this)
165→        }
166→        cardsOrNotesFlow.update { newValue }
167→    }
168→
169→    fun setTruncated(value: Boolean) {
170→        viewModelScope.launch {
171→            isTruncatedFlow.emit(value)
172→        }
173→        sharedPrefs().edit {
174→            putBoolean("isTruncated", value)
175→        }
176→    }
177→
178→    fun selectAll() {
179→        if (_selectedRows.addAll(cards.wrapped)) {
180→            refreshSelectedRowsFlow()
181→        }
182→    }
183→
184→    fun selectNone() {
185→        if (_selectedRows.isEmpty()) return
186→        _selectedRows.clear()
187→        refreshSelectedRowsFlow()
188→    }
189→
190→    fun toggleRowSelectionAtPosition(position: Int) {
191→        val card = cards[position]
192→        if (_selectedRows.contains(card)) {
193→            _selectedRows.remove(card)
194→        } else {
195→            _selectedRows.add(card)
196→        }
197→        refreshSelectedRowsFlow()
198→    }
199→
200→    fun selectRowAtPosition(pos: Int) {
201→        if (_selectedRows.add(cards[pos])) {
202→            refreshSelectedRowsFlow()
203→        }
204→    }
205→
206→    /**
207→     * Selects the cards between [startPos] and [endPos]
208→     */
209→    fun selectRowsBetweenPositions(startPos: Int, endPos: Int) {
210→        val cards = (min(startPos, endPos)..max(startPos, endPos)).map { cards[it] }
211→        if (_selectedRows.addAll(cards)) {
212→            refreshSelectedRowsFlow()
213→        }
214→    }
215→
216→    /** emits a new value in [selectedRowsFlow] */
217→    private fun refreshSelectedRowsFlow() = viewModelScope.launch {
218→        refreshSelectedRowsFlow.emit(Unit)
219→    }
220→
221→    fun selectedRowCount(): Int = selectedRows.size
222→
223→    fun setColumn1Index(value: Int) = column1IndexFlow.update { value }
224→
225→    fun setColumn2Index(value: Int) = column2IndexFlow.update { value }
226→    suspend fun suspendCards() {
227→        val cardIds = selectedCardIds
228→        if (cardIds.isEmpty()) {
229→            return
230→        }
231→
232→        undoableOp {
233→            // if all cards are suspended, unsuspend all
234→            // if no cards are suspended, suspend all
235→            // if there is a mix, suspend all
236→            val wantUnsuspend = cardIds.all { getCard(it).queue == Consts.QUEUE_TYPE_SUSPENDED }
237→            if (wantUnsuspend) {
238→                sched.unsuspendCards(cardIds)
239→            } else {
240→                sched.suspendCards(cardIds).changes
241→            }
242→        }
243→    }
244→
245→    /** @return an [ExportDialogParams] based on the current screen state */
246→    suspend fun getExportDialogParams(resources: Resources): ExportDialogParams? {
247→        if (!isInMultiSelectMode) return null
248→        return when (cardsOrNotes) {
249→            CARDS -> {
250→                val selectedCardIds = selectedCardIds
251→                ExportDialogParams(
252→                    message = resources.getQuantityString(
253→                        R.plurals.confirm_apkg_export_selected_cards,
254→                        selectedCardIds.size,
255→                        selectedCardIds.size
256→                    ),
257→                    exportType = ExportType.ExportCards(selectedCardIds)
258→                )
259→            }
260→            NOTES -> {
261→                val selectedNoteIds = withCol { CardService.selectedNoteIds(selectedCardIds, this) }
262→                ExportDialogParams(
263→                    message = resources.getQuantityString(
264→                        R.plurals.confirm_apkg_export_selected_notes,
265→                        selectedNoteIds.size,
266→                        selectedNoteIds.size
267→                    ),
268→                    exportType = ExportType.ExportNotes(selectedNoteIds)
269→                )
270→            }
271→        }
272→    }
273→
274→    /**
275→     * @see [com.ichi2.libanki.sched.Scheduler.sortCards]
276→     * @return the number of cards which were repositioned
277→     */
278→    suspend fun repositionSelectedRows(position: Int) = undoableOp {
279→        sched.sortCards(selectedCardIds, position, 1, shuffle = false, shift = true)
280→    }.count
281→
282→    /** Returns the number of rows of the current result set  */
283→    val rowCount: Int
284→        get() = cards.size()
285→
286→    fun getCardIdAtPosition(position: Int): CardId = cards[position].id
287→
288→    fun getRowAtPosition(position: Int) = cards[position]
289→
290→    /** Given a card ID, returns a position-aware card */
291→    fun findCardById(id: CardId): CardBrowser.CardCache? = cards.find { it.id == id }
292→
293→    val cardIdToPositionMap: Map<CardId, Int>
294→        get() = cards.mapIndexed { i, c -> c.id to i }.toMap()
295→
296→    override fun onCleared() {
297→        super.onCleared()
298→        invalidate()
299→    }
300→
301→    private fun invalidate() {
302→        // TODO: this may no longer be needed now we call invalidate from onCleared
303→        cards.clear()
304→        selectNone()
305→    }
306→
307→    companion object {
308→        const val DISPLAY_COLUMN_1_KEY = "cardBrowserColumn1"
309→        const val DISPLAY_COLUMN_2_KEY = "cardBrowserColumn2"
310→        fun factory(preferencesProvider: SharedPreferencesProvider? = null) = viewModelFactory {
311→            initializer {
312→                CardBrowserViewModel(preferencesProvider ?: AnkiDroidApp.sharedPreferencesProvider)
313→            }
314→        }
315→    }
316→}

 177→    private var onEditCardActivityResult = registerForActivityResult(StartActivityForResult()) { result: ActivityResult ->
 178→        Timber.d("onEditCardActivityResult: resultCode=%d", result.resultCode)
 179→        if (result.resultCode == DeckPicker.RESULT_DB_ERROR) {
 180→            closeCardBrowser(DeckPicker.RESULT_DB_ERROR)
 181→        }
 182→        if (result.resultCode != RESULT_CANCELED) {
 183→            Timber.i("CardBrowser:: CardBrowser: Saving card...")
 184→            launchCatchingTask { saveEditedCard() }
 185→        }
 186→        val data = result.data
 187→        if (data != null &&
 188→            (data.getBooleanExtra(NoteEditor.RELOAD_REQUIRED_EXTRA_KEY, false) || data.getBooleanExtra(NoteEditor.NOTE_CHANGED_EXTRA_KEY, false))
 189→        ) {
 190→            Timber.d("Reloading Card Browser due to activity result")
 191→            // if reloadRequired or noteChanged flag was sent from note editor then reload card list
 192→            mShouldRestoreScroll = true
 193→            searchCards()
 194→            // in use by reviewer?
 195→            if (reviewerCardId == mCurrentCardId) {
 196→                mReloadRequired = true
 197→            }
 198→        }
 199→        invalidateOptionsMenu() // maybe the availability of undo changed
 200→    }
 201→    private var onAddNoteActivityResult = registerForActivityResult(StartActivityForResult()) { result: ActivityResult ->
 202→        Timber.d("onAddNoteActivityResult: resultCode=%d", result.resultCode)
 203→        if (result.resultCode == DeckPicker.RESULT_DB_ERROR) {
 204→            closeCardBrowser(DeckPicker.RESULT_DB_ERROR)
 205→        }
 206→        if (result.resultCode == RESULT_OK) {
 207→            if (mSearchView != null) {
 208→                mSearchTerms = mSearchView!!.query.toString()
 209→                searchCards()
 210→            } else {
 211→                Timber.w("Note was added from browser and on return mSearchView == null")
 212→            }
 213→        }
 214→        invalidateOptionsMenu() // maybe the availability of undo changed
 215→    }
 216→    private var onPreviewCardsActivityResult = registerForActivityResult(StartActivityForResult()) { result: ActivityResult ->
 217→        Timber.d("onPreviewCardsActivityResult: resultCode=%d", result.resultCode)
 218→        if (result.resultCode == DeckPicker.RESULT_DB_ERROR) {

 395→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {

 421→        val preferences = baseContext.sharedPrefs()

 502→    override fun onCollectionLoaded(col: com.ichi2.libanki.Collection) {
 503→        super.onCollectionLoaded(col)
 504→        Timber.d("onCollectionLoaded()")
 505→        registerExternalStorageListener()
 506→        val preferences = baseContext.sharedPrefs()
 507→
 508→        mOrder = SortType.fromCol(col.config, preferences)
 509→        mOrderAsc = col.config.get("sortBackwards") ?: false
 510→        mCards.reset()
 511→        // Create a spinner for column 1
 512→        findViewById<Spinner>(R.id.browser_column1_spinner).apply {
 513→            adapter = ArrayAdapter.createFromResource(
 514→                this@CardBrowser,
 515→                R.array.browser_column1_headings,
 516→                android.R.layout.simple_spinner_item
 517→            ).apply {
 518→                setDropDownViewResource(R.layout.spinner_custom_layout)
 519→            }
 520→            onItemSelectedListener = BasicItemSelectedListener { pos, _ ->
 521→                viewModel.setColumn1Index(pos)
 522→            }
 523→            setSelection(viewModel.column1Index)
 524→        }
 525→        // Setup the column 2 heading as a spinner so that users can easily change the column type
 526→        findViewById<Spinner>(R.id.browser_column2_spinner).apply {
 527→            adapter = ArrayAdapter.createFromResource(
 528→                this@CardBrowser,
 529→                R.array.browser_column2_headings,
 530→                android.R.layout.simple_spinner_item
 531→            ).apply {
 532→                // The custom layout for the adapter is used to prevent the overlapping of various interactive components on the screen
 533→                setDropDownViewResource(R.layout.spinner_custom_layout)
 534→            }
 535→            // Create a new list adapter with updated column map any time the user changes the column
 536→            onItemSelectedListener = BasicItemSelectedListener { pos, _ ->
 537→                viewModel.setColumn2Index(pos)
 538→            }
 539→            setSelection(viewModel.column2Index)
 540→        }
 541→
 542→        cardsListView.setOnItemClickListener { _: AdapterView<*>?, view: View?, position: Int, _: Long ->
 543→            if (isInMultiSelectMode) {
 544→                // click on whole cell triggers select
 545→                val cb = view!!.findViewById<CheckBox>(R.id.card_checkbox)
 546→                cb.toggle()
 547→                viewModel.selectRowAtPosition(position)
 548→            } else {
 549→                // load up the card selected on the list
 550→                val clickedCardId = viewModel.getCardIdAtPosition(position)
 551→                saveScrollingState(position)
 552→                openNoteEditorForCard(clickedCardId)
 553→            }
 554→        }
 555→        @KotlinCleanup("helper function for min/max range")
 556→        cardsListView.setOnItemLongClickListener { _: AdapterView<*>?, view: View?, position: Int, _: Long ->
 557→            if (isInMultiSelectMode) {
 558→                viewModel.selectRowsBetweenPositions(mLastSelectedPosition, position)
 559→            } else {
 560→                mLastSelectedPosition = position
 561→                saveScrollingState(position)
 562→                loadMultiSelectMode()
 563→
 564→                // click on whole cell triggers select
 565→                val cb = view!!.findViewById<CheckBox>(R.id.card_checkbox)
 566→                cb.toggle()
 567→                viewModel.toggleRowSelectionAtPosition(position)
 568→                recenterListView(view)
 569→                cardsAdapter.notifyDataSetChanged()
 570→            }
 571→            true
 572→        }
 573→        window.setSoftInputMode(WindowManager.LayoutParams.SOFT_INPUT_STATE_ALWAYS_HIDDEN)
 574→        val deckId = col.decks.selected()
 575→        deckSpinnerSelection = DeckSpinnerSelection(
 576→            this,
 577→            col,
 578→            findViewById(R.id.toolbar_spinner),
 579→            showAllDecks = true,
 580→            alwaysShowDefault = false,
 581→            showFilteredDecks = true
 582→        )
 583→        deckSpinnerSelection!!.initializeActionBarDeckSpinner(this.supportActionBar!!)
 584→        selectDeckAndSave(deckId)
 585→
 586→        // If a valid value for last deck exists then use it, otherwise use libanki selected deck
 587→        if (lastDeckId != null && lastDeckId == ALL_DECKS_ID) {
 588→            selectAllDecks()
 589→        } else if (lastDeckId != null && col.decks.get(lastDeckId!!) != null) {
 590→            deckSpinnerSelection!!.selectDeckById(lastDeckId!!, false)
 591→        } else {
 592→            deckSpinnerSelection!!.selectDeckById(col.decks.selected(), false)
 593→        }
 594→    }

 596→    fun selectDeckAndSave(deckId: DeckId) {
